name: JetBrains Air
description: An agentic development environment for delegating coding tasks to multiple AI agents and running them concurrently. Built on JetBrains' 26 years of experience, Air integrates tools around the agent rather than the code editor, supporting Codex, Claude Agent, Gemini CLI, and Junie.
community_quotes: JetBrains believes agents are changing how software is made
Air is designed to delegate tasks to multiple AI agents running concurrently
Built on the foundation of JetBrains' abandoned Fleet project
A new wave of dev tooling built on 26 years of experience

name: Anthropic Claude Code Review
description: A multi-agent code review system for Claude Code that automatically analyzes AI-generated code in pull requests, flags logic errors, and checks code quality. Dispatches teams of AI reviewers to examine PRs with depth and suggest fixes.
community_quotes: Multi-agent system that dispatches teams of AI reviewers
Designed to handle the flood of AI-generated code
Automatically reviews pull requests for bugs and logic errors
Dispatches parallel code review agents to catch bugs

name: Junie CLI
description: JetBrains' standalone AI coding agent CLI that previously could only be used as an IDE extension. Makes the Junie AI agent fully standalone with support for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Grok models. Costs from $10/month for individuals.
community_quotes: Makes Junie AI agent fully standalone
Previously only available as IDE extension
Junie can run code and tests to reduce warnings and compilation errors

name: Databricks Genie Code
description: An autonomous AI agent that brings 'agentic engineering' to data work. Focuses on autonomous coding capabilities for data engineering tasks, integrating with Databricks' data platform.
community_quotes: Brings agentic engineering to data work
